Vendored from: https://github.com/AutoNUE/public-code
Commit:        5d9a93beb176b03dd32c79ce050d0fbddc9acd00
Commit date:   2021-02-15
Vendored on:   2026-07-17
Vendored by:   DRIVYX (CLAUDE.md section 7 requires a vendored, patched copy)

Files taken (only what gen-masks needs; the upstream repo is 59 MB and most of it is
domain-adaptation training code that DRIVYX does not use):

  preperation/createLabels.py     entry point, run as a subprocess by data/masks.py
  preperation/json2labelImg.py    polygon -> label PNG rasteriser
  preperation/json2instanceImg.py imported by createLabels.py at module scope
  helpers/anue_labels.py          the label table; build-lut resolves names against it
  helpers/annotation.py           JSON annotation reader

LICENSE: the upstream repository contains no LICENSE file and its README states no terms.
The code is published publicly by the AutoNUE challenge organisers for use with the IDD
dataset. This is recorded here because the absence of an explicit licence is a fact a
downstream consumer of DRIVYX needs to know. See docs/DECISIONS.md D018.

Every modification to these files is documented line by line in third_party/PATCHES.md.
